title: 24Pcs Artificial Silk Italian Ruscus Greenery Plants Spray for Home Decor
features: Wedding Decor: These faux Italian Ruscus greens can be used in a bridal bouquet and flower arrangements for a wedding.
Realistic Looking: Fairly realistic looking, especially in a cluster with other foliage or flowers and eucalyptus or other artificial vines.
High-quality Material: 1176 pointed green leaves are made of high-quality silk and have various different shades of green to give them more depth and realism.

Background Greenery: These artificial Italian Ruscus greens are pretty easy to shape and fluff and full, ling stems, and have a beautiful variety of green colors. Perfect for bouquets, floral arrangements, table centerpieces, arch, chair, wedding sign decorations and other backdrop decorations.

Enjoy to DIY: As the silk greenery stems were easy to cut into the lengths I needed, so they are nice filler for floral arrangements to meet your decorative needs.Placed in vases with other artificial flowers and it will be great.
description: Details: - Color: green - Material: Silk and plastic - Package: 24 pieces -Weight: 200g The green leaves are made of silk ,and each stem is 24in with 49 pointed green leaves. The stems with the leaves are as adjustable as you would like and the leaves are very attractive. The stems with the leaves are as adjustable as you would like and the leaves are very attractive. The artificial Italian Ruscus greenery are also ideal green filler for holiday decorations,such as Christmas,Halloween.
